title: ScaleAware-JEPA: Latent Representation for Discovery in Multiscale Physical Fields
title_zh: ScaleAware-JEPA：面向多尺度物理场发现的潜表示
abstract: Continuous physical fields represent a large fraction of data under scientific investigation. Their multiscale structures are central to discovery, yet useful coordinates are not known in advance. Standard self-supervised methods define context and targets in fixed image coordinates, posing a predictive task misaligned with fields organized across a continuous scale hierarchy. We introduce ScaleAware-JEPA, a framework that constructs dense, label-free latent coordinates for continuous scalar fields. Constrained Diffusion Decomposition (CDD) separates each field into pixel-registered scale components and provides the scale coordinates that define the masking geometry. The resulting JEPA objective predicts hidden structure with a context footprint tied to the diffusion scale of each component rather than to an arbitrary patch size. Across MHD turbulence, interstellar molecular gas and urban nighttime-light structure, the learned geometry maps back to coherent morphology, forming dense structural atlases without labels or predefined segmentation rules. By tying latent prediction to the scale hierarchy of a field, ScaleAware-JEPA constructs latent coordinates through which complex physical patterns can be inspected before their relevant structures have been prescribed. Code is available at https://github.com/gxli/SA-JEPA.
abstract_zh: 连续物理场构成了科学研究中很大一部分数据。其多尺度结构对发现至关重要，但有用的坐标事先未知。标准的自监督方法在固定图像坐标中定义上下文和目标，所提出的预测任务与按连续尺度层次组织的场不匹配。我们提出了ScaleAware-JEPA，一个为连续标量场构建密集、无标签潜坐标的框架。约束扩散分解（CDD）将每个场分离为像素对齐的尺度分量，并提供定义掩码几何的尺度坐标。由此产生的JEPA目标预测隐藏结构，其上下文足迹与每个分量的扩散尺度相关，而非任意块大小。在磁流体动力学湍流、星际分子气体和城市夜间灯光结构上，学习到的几何映射回连贯的形态，形成无需标签或预定义分割规则的密集结构图谱。通过将潜预测与场的尺度层次绑定，ScaleAware-JEPA构建了潜坐标，通过这些坐标可以在相关结构被规定之前检查复杂的物理模式。代码见https://github.com/gxli/SA-JEPA。
tldr_zh: 提出无标签潜坐标框架，通过尺度层次预测物理场隐藏结构。
cover_zh: 不用标签也能看懂物理场｜这个AI自己学会了多尺度结构
